plugins.name: codebase-reading
plugins.description: Salience-map onboarding for unfamiliar repos: mine backbone, churn, discussion, and incident layers into a tiered reading roadmap, with git/PR archaeology for the why.

plugins.name: mentor
plugins.description: Multi-session repo tutor: curated curricula, file-grounded lessons that climb to general concepts, quizzes with a hard close-out gate, resumable across sessions.
